installer-gui-script.title: AI Competency Agent
installer-gui-script.welcome:
AI Competency Agent

This installer will set up the AI Competency Agent on your Mac.

The agent runs locally and exposes a WebSocket endpoint at ws://127.0.0.1:8889 so your browser-based notebook UI can execute Python/AI/ML code on this machine.

choice.title: AI Competency Agent
choice.description: Install the AI Competency Agent runtime and background service.
